self = <selenium.webdriver.support.wait.WebDriverWait (session="e3edc9e4b261da284a78c34c83c3e12e")> method = <function visibility_of_element_located.<locals>._predicate at 0x7ff966f1e700> message = ''
def until(self, method: Callable[[D], Literal[False] | T], message: str = "") -> T: """Wait until the method returns a value that is not False.
Calls the method provided with the driver as an argument until the return value does not evaluate to ``False``.
Args: method: A callable object that takes a WebDriver instance as an argument. message: Optional message for TimeoutException.
Returns: The result of the last call to `method`.
Raises: TimeoutException: If 'method' does not return a truthy value within the WebDriverWait object's timeout.
Example: >>> from selenium.webdriver.common.by import By >>> from selenium.webdriver.support.ui import WebDriverWait >>> from selenium.webdriver.support import expected_conditions as EC >>> >>> # Wait until an element is visible on the page >>> wait = WebDriverWait(driver, 10) >>> element = wait.until(EC.visibility_of_element_located((By.ID, "exampleId"))) >>> print(element.text) """ screen = None stacktrace = None
end_time = time.monotonic() + self._timeout while True: try: value = method(self._driver) if value: return value except self._ignored_exceptions as exc: screen = getattr(exc, "screen", None) stacktrace = getattr(exc, "stacktrace", None) if time.monotonic() > end_time: break time.sleep(self._poll) > raise TimeoutException(message, screen, stacktrace) E selenium.common.exceptions.TimeoutException: Message: E Stacktrace: E Symbols not available. self = <tests.evite_acceptance.test_evite_rsvp_premium.TestEviteRSVPPremium object at 0x7ff9673e8320> config = <commons.test_configuration.TestConfiguration object at 0x7ff966f69fa0>
def test_evite_rsvp_premium(self, config): _test_name = inspect.stack()[0][3]
page = config.pages["page"]
evite_home_page = config.pages["evite_home_page"]
rsvp_modal = config.pages["rsvp_modal"] event_details = config.pages["event_details"] who_is_coming = config.pages["who_is_coming"] my_events = config.pages["my_events"] login_modal = config.pages["login_modal"]
step1_template = config.pages["step1_template"] step2_event_details = config.pages["step2_event_details"] step5_guests = config.pages["step5_guests"] step6_review_send = config.pages["step6_review_send"] invitation_page = config.pages["evite_view_invitation"]
quake_v3_event = QuakeV3Event(_test_name) psql_db = PostgreSQL(_test_name)
# Logger logger = LoggingConfig().initialize_logger(_test_name) logger.info(f"Start {_test_name}")
page.get_url(environment=config.environment)
# Sign-In or Register user_email_addr, user_pass, host = login_modal.sign_in_register(test_data=self._json_test_data)
# Create Invitation evite_gallery_page = evite_home_page.select_nav("create_invitation") evite_gallery_page.select_filter_by(["premium"])
# Pick up a random template from the template page evite_gallery_page.select_random_template(template_type="premium")
self._json_test_data["invitation"]["event_details"]["event_title"] = Utils().get_event_title() self._json_test_data["invitation"]["event_details"]["start_date"] = Utils().get_rand_date(test_name=_test_name) self._json_test_data["invitation"]["event_details"]["start_time"] = Utils().get_start_time(premium=True) self._json_test_data["invitation"]["event_details"]["host"] = ( f"{self._json_test_data['register']['first_name']} " f"{self._json_test_data['register']['last_name']}" )
# Step 1: Card Editor step1_template.fill_text_editors(test_data=self._json_test_data) step1_template.select_next(url="details")
# Step 2: Enter Details page step2_event_details.enter_details(test_data=self._json_test_data) step1_template.select_next(url="gifting") step1_template.select_next(url="preview")
step1_template.select_next(url="guests") > step5_guests.add_guests(test_data=self._json_test_data["guests"])
_test_name = 'test_evite_rsvp_premium' config = <commons.test_configuration.TestConfiguration object at 0x7ff966f69fa0> event_details = <commons.pages.evite.evite_view_invitation_event_details_module.EventDetailsModule object at 0x7ff966f69be0> evite_gallery_page = <commons.pages.evite.evite_gallery_page.EviteGalleryPage object at 0x7ff966f6b020> evite_home_page = <commons.pages.evite.evite_home_page.EviteHomePage object at 0x7ff966f69c40> host = 'automation test' invitation_page = <commons.pages.evite.evite_view_invitation.EviteViewInvitation object at 0x7ff966f68dd0> logger = <Logger test_evite_rsvp_premium (INFO)> login_modal = <commons.pages.evite.login_modal.LoginModal object at 0x7ff966f69ee0> my_events = <commons.pages.evite.my_events.MyEvents object at 0x7ff966f69e80> page = <commons.page.Page object at 0x7ff966f693a0> psql_db = <lib.postgre_sql.PostgreSQL object at 0x7ff966f69fd0> quake_v3_event = <commons.pages.quake_v3.quake_v3_event.QuakeV3Event object at 0x7ff966f69880> rsvp_modal = <commons.pages.evite.evite_view_invitation_rsvp_modal.RSVPModal object at 0x7ff966f69a60> self = <tests.evite_acceptance.test_evite_rsvp_premium.TestEviteRSVPPremium object at 0x7ff9673e8320> step1_template = <commons.pages.evite.step1_template.Step1Template object at 0x7ff966f69130> step2_event_details = <commons.pages.evite.step2_event_details.Step2EventDetails object at 0x7ff966f69c10> step5_guests = <commons.pages.evite.step5_guests.Step5Guests object at 0x7ff966f69d90> step6_review_send = <commons.pages.evite.step6_review_send.Step6ReviewSend object at 0x7ff966f69df0> user_email_addr = 'evite-03052026-131729-29-test@evitetest.com' user_pass = 'test1234' who_is_coming = <commons.pages.evite.evite_view_invitation_whos_coming_module.WhosComingModule object at 0x7ff966f68d10>

self = <commons.pages.evite.step5_guests.Step5Guests object at 0x7ff966f69d90> locator = ('css selector', '.new-guest-page'), timeout = 30
def wait_for(self, locator, timeout=None): """ Waits for an element to be visible using the passed in locator.
:param locator: Locator tuple for the element :param timeout: (Int) Number of seconds to wait for an element :return: WebElement if it is visible """ timeout = timeout or settings.DEFAULT_TIMEOUT
try: return WebDriverWait(self.selenium, timeout).until(ec.visibility_of_element_located(locator)) except TimeoutException as e: msg = f"Timed out waiting for element: {locator} at URL: {self.selenium.current_url}" self.logger.info(msg) > raise ElementNotFoundError(msg) from e E utils.exceptions.ElementNotFoundError: Timed out waiting for element: ('css selector', '.new-guest-page') at URL: https://test30.evitelabs.com/invitation/03A8IIAE4SKDAARK6EPRDDMMU7MHTQ/guests?v=&c=featured&previous=featured&page=1&invitation_type=invitation&invitation_type=premium&category_id=featured&pos=14
